productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Jacket
description: Composition Grey hooded jacket made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane sweatshirt fabric, has slightly puffed full sleeves with elasticated cuffs in ruched satin, front zipper below the chest to the hem, bow above the zipper, two pockets on the sides and hood all with ruched satin edging and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron This unique jacket from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for winter versatility. sportswear jersey and metal utility zip give a modern, urban feel while the satin ruffles and bow give a fairytale air, making you the look feminine and fashion-forward. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a monochrome tee and ankle high boots. Wear a vibrant stole to add colour. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
